title: croton jorgei
intro: Croton jorgei, also known as the croton of the Philippines, is a species of flowering plant in the spurge family (Euphorbiaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to reduce inflammation and fight against bacterial and fungal infections. The plant's health benefits are attributed to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of various health conditions, such as fever, sore throat, and skin infections. Croton jorgei is often used to prepare herbal remedies, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be made by steeping the plant's leaves and roots in hot water.
